svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="J4rOrjZ5uEIYS-cAwV19"> <mxGraphModel dx="703" dy="970" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
!theme spacelab
skinparam shadowing true
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam ArrowThickness 2

title <b>AI Contract Summarization System (RAG Architecture)</b>

package \"🌐 Frontend Layer\" #D6EAF8 {
 [Thymeleaf UI] #5DADE2
}

package \"⚙️ Backend (Spring Boot)\" #D5F5E3 {
 [Upload Controller] #58D68D
 [Processing Service] #58D68D
 [Chunking Service] #58D68D
 [Analysis Controller] #58D68D
 [Risk Analyzer] #58D68D
}

package \"🧠 AI Layer (RAG Engine)\" #FAD7A0 {
 [Embedding Generator] #F5B041
 [Vector DB (FAISS)] #F39C12
 [LLM Engine] #E67E22
}

package \"💾 Data Layer\" #E8DAEF {
 [MongoDB] #AF7AC5
}

actor User

User --> [Thymeleaf UI]

[Thymeleaf UI] --> [Upload Controller]
[Upload Controller] --> [Processing Service]
[Processing Service] --> [Chunking Service]
[Chunking Service] --> [Embedding Generator]
[Embedding Generator] --> [Vector DB (FAISS)]

[Thymeleaf UI] --> [Analysis Controller]
[Analysis Controller] --> [Embedding Generator]
[Embedding Generator] --> [Vector DB (FAISS)]
[Vector DB (FAISS)] --> [LLM Engine]
[LLM Engine] --> [Analysis Controller]

[Analysis Controller] --> [Risk Analyzer]
[Risk Analyzer] --> [MongoDB]
[Analysis Controller] --> [MongoDB]

[Analysis Controller] --> [Thymeleaf UI]

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="s31tFLLTC1g4qOQDU-kv-6"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="760" width="799" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
